meta.summary: New standalone lookup/support table "Sources" (IT domain "Fonti"), used to classify the provenance of registry records ("Anagrafiche"). Built as a thin adapter over the generic table/authorization/for-select framework, mirroring the ReferentTypes module 1:1 (spec 0016). Single business field: name (required text).

decisions.decision: Model=Source, table=sources, resource key/permission prefix/i18n namespace/table domain = "sources", route param {source}.

User-approved (AskUserQuestion): build ONLY the standalone Sources table now. The target foreign key (anagrafiche.source_id) and the restrict-on-delete guard are DEFERRED and wired later, when the target entity is defined. Until then Source::delete is a plain delete (mirrors ReferentType).

Delete-protection requirement is acknowledged but out of scope now because it needs the target FK. When wired: referencing FK = restrictOnDelete + SourceService::delete checks dependents via ->exists() and abort(409, friendly message); frontend runDelete branches 409|422 to a deleteInUse toast. See spec 0017 ProductCategoryService for the pattern.

data-model.note: No old_id / external-migration source now (add later if Sources needs import).

permissions.note: Generated automatically by permissions:sync from SourcePolicy + the navigation entry. No manual permission-string list.

endpoint.note: declared FIRST so the literal wins over the {source} wildcard

acceptance-criteria.ac: Migration creates sources table; up+down reversible.
Full CRUD via REST returns the standard envelope; store=201, destroy=204.
Every endpoint authorizes server-side; user without permission -> 403.
GET /meta/sources returns field metadata (name text, mandatory) honoring the per-role field-permission matrix.
Table domain 'sources' returns rows with name+created_at, supports filter/sort/search; generic export works.
for-select returns { id, label } paginated + hydrates explicit ids.
Frontend: list page (grid + toolbar), create/edit/view sheet forms, Can-gated New button and route, i18n en/it, deleteForbidden(403) toast.
Navigation entry sources -> /sources visible with sources.view.
Backend Pest (crud, for-select, meta, security, table) + frontend vitest green; Pint + tsc + ESLint clean.
